figures.caption: Figure 2: Empirical fdp and tdp distributions for the four graph topologies when 𝑛 = 𝑝 = 100. For each method, boxplots summarize performance over 50 replications. The horizontal dashed line indicates the nominal false discovery rate level 𝛼 = 0.1.

Figure 3: (a) Conditional independence network inferred by HSS-GGM at nominal level 𝛼 = 0.05 for the pCR subgroup. (b) Comparison of edges detected by different network inference methods. The left column reports the number of methods detecting each interaction.

Figure 4: Partial correlation network of S&P 100 stocks inferred by HSS-GGM at nominal level 𝛼 = 0.05. Node colours indicate sector membership: red for Technology, green for Healthcare, and blue for Financials. Edges represent conditional dependencies between stock returns after adjustment for all other assets.
